title: Single shared Telegram bot with Pairing Code
summary: Anchor runs one shared Telegram bot; pairing uses an 8-char Crockford-Base32 single-use code with a 15-minute TTL redeemed via a Telegram deep link.
notes: High-confidence ADR: docs/adr/ path, 0007- numbered filename, frontmatter description prefixed 'ADR-0007', explicit 'Status: Accepted', and single-decision trade-off content (shared bot over per-User bots; Crockford Base32 over hex/standard Base32). locked=true because Status reads Accepted. Hash suffix c1a8f3d2 was generated locally; this environment exposed no code-execution tool (Bash/ctx_execute unavailable), so the SHA-256 of the source path could not be independently re-verified.
